title: psiadia ceylanica var. beddomei
intro: Psiadia ceylanica var. beddomei is a variant of the Psiadia ceylanica plant, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae, native to Sri Lanka. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Psiadia ceylanica var. beddomei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
